title: Authorized governance complexity budget repair
outOfScope: All feature, fixture, documentation, and release changes.
Changing the governance complexity measurement algorithm.

sources.reason: Authorized temporary Python complexity ceiling repair.

riskAssessment.reason: Small, explicit budget-only policy adjustment with deterministic checks.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

preReviewWarnings: Verify only the measured ceiling change and complete the full lifecycle.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Raise the Python complexity maximum just enough for the measured 36,006 lines.
Record the user authorization and repayment ownership in the policy evidence.
All declared governance and project checks pass.
guidelines: Keep the change limited to the declared governance budget policy.

intent.problem: The authorized serial recalibration work increased measured Python lines to 36,006, exceeding the current 36,000 ceiling and blocking the next Work Item finish.
constraints: Budget-only change; preserve the measurement algorithm and all existing checks.
This is independent from the current unsupported-claim implementation and must use its own branch and PR.
intent.rationale: A bounded, evidence-backed ceiling repair is needed so the separately scoped regression-gate Work Item can complete without mixing unrelated implementation changes.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Measured Python lines are within the repaired ceiling.
Policy remains valid YAML and governance complexity check passes.

rawUserRequest: User authorized creation of an independent budget repair Work Item/PR, then continuation without starting Work Item 1.

declaredIntent.summary: Repair only the governance complexity budget required by measured current repository state.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Explicit user authorization in the task conversation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
